title: Institute office closed for summer break: 18.7–16.8.2026
content:
Our office will be closed from the 18th of July to the 16th of August. You can still email us, we’ll reply after we return. Happy summer!

The post Institute office closed for summer break: 18.7–16.8.2026 appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.
snippet: Our office will be closed from the 18th of July to the 16th of August. You can still email us, we’ll reply after we return. Happy summer!
creator: ela
sourceDescription: Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux

title: Vilma Vanhanen selected for Zoöp Connections residency with Buitenplaats Brienenoord and Nieuwe Instituut
content:
The residency takes place 1–30 September 2026 in Rotterdam as part of EUNIC Netherlands' networked knowledge exchange programme.

The post Vilma Vanhanen selected for Zoöp Connections residency with Buitenplaats Brienenoord and Nieuwe Instituut appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.

title: EXPRMNTL 4 revisited: Belgian avant-garde legend to be screened at Cinéstesia
content:
Cinéstesia, a new initiative exploring the intersection of film and visual arts at the Espoo Ciné International Film Festival, 21–30 August 2026 in Espoo & Helsinki.

The post EXPRMNTL 4 revisited: Belgian avant-garde legend to be screened at Cinéstesia appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.

title: Blog post: A glimpse into the circus scene in Belgium
content:

content:

title: Aalto University presents circular economy solutions at The Festival of the New European Bauhaus 2026
content:
Visit Aalto University’s The Pathfinders exhibition at the NEB Fair, 10–12.6.2026, and discover research tackling circular economy challenges.

content:

title: Help shape the Institute’s strategy for 2027–2030
content:

title: Learn Finnish online this summer: new intensive course for beginners
content:
Learn Finnish online from anywhere in the world with live online classes this August. Classes begin 3.8.2026.
